name: scarlet witch
bio: Wanda Maximoff is adept at harnessing formidable chaos magic, casting hexes with the power to twist and reshape reality itself. Energy, space, and matter are mere playthings in the hands of Scarlet Witch!
lore:
Wanda Maximoff's ability to manipulate chaos magic makes her one of the most powerful living beings in the universe. As the Scarlet Witch, she seeks to harness that chaos, restoring some semblance of order to a world that is constantly on the brink of destruction.
Since the Timestream Entanglement, chaos magic is one of the few forces holding the threads of reality together. Should her powers fail, the Scarlet Witch truly believes that this universe will disintegrate, along with everyone in it. It is a fate she refuses to allow… no matter the cost…

costumes.name: Doctor Strange In The Multiverse Of Madness

abilities.name: Chaos Control
abilities.description: Unleash Chaos Magic on enemies to deal damage and restore <Orange>Chaos Energy</>

additional_fields.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 3m and a height of 20m
additional_fields.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 10m, decreasing to 90% at 20m
additional_fields.Special Effect 1: Attack the nearest enemy within range
additional_fields.Special Effect 2: Hitting with Chaos Control charges Chthonian Burst

abilities.name: Chthonian Burst
abilities.description: Consume <Orange>Chaos Energy</> to fire explosive magic missiles, damaging enemies.

additional_fields.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

abilities.name: Dark Seal
abilities.description: Land a hit on a target or the scene, or press again to generate a Force Field that periodically <Debuff>Stuns</> enemies within range.

additional_fields.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

abilities.name: Mystic Projection
abilities.description: Enter the <Orange>Phased</> state for free-flight. Press {Ability2} to exit early.

additional_fields.Special Effect: During this period, Scarlet Witch enters the Projection state, can be healed by teammates

abilities.name: Reality Erasure
abilities.description: Engage in free-flight while gaining <Buff>Bonus Health</> and charging energy. While flying, continuously <Debuff>pull in</> nearby enemies, then unleash charged energy to deal massive area damage.

additional_fields.Slow Rate: Begin to slow down by 1.5s, with the effect gradually increasing to -25% by 3.5s
additional_fields.Special Effect: During this period, Scarlet Witch enters a Free-flight state, pulls in nearby enemies (within 15m radius) during cast charge. Max pull speed up to 3m/s

additional_fields.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact
additional_fields.Special Mechanic: Chaos Control can released during the Sorcery Surge
